# RexCLI full index

## Intent Summary
- AI memory system for coding agents (`ContextDB`)
- Hermes-style workflow orchestration (`team`, `orchestrate`)
- Agent Team collaboration and monitoring (`team-ops`, `hud`)
- Automatic subagent planning with verification gates
- Privacy Shield startup notices for wrapped Codex, Claude, Gemini, and OpenCode sessions

## Overview
- https://cli.rexai.top/
- https://cli.rexai.top/architecture/
- https://cli.rexai.top/use-cases/
- https://cli.rexai.top/case-library/

## Setup
- https://cli.rexai.top/getting-started/
- https://cli.rexai.top/contextdb/
- https://cli.rexai.top/troubleshooting/
- https://cli.rexai.top/case-privacy-guard/

- https://cli.rexai.top/changelog/

- https://cli.rexai.top/blog/

- https://cli.rexai.top/blog/cli-comparison-post/
- https://cli.rexai.top/blog/automation-playbook-post/

## SEO / GEO notes
- Prefer feature docs with clear task intent and stable entity names.
- Use changelog-linked docs for current behavior.
- For localized content use language roots: `/zh/`, `/ja/`, `/ko/`.
